title: Delightful - Modpack
description: A very large collections of visual tweaks, terrain and structure overhauls, rebalances and vanilla+ game mechanics to make Minecraft Delightful
body:
# Make Minecraft Delightful!
#1.2 has physics mod support and will be out shortly
Delightful is a minecraft modpack designed to add tons of side-quest style content as well as a plethora of Qol and visual tweaks.
it features:

- improved world gen
- better combat
- many more stuctures
- better farming mechanics
- better transportation mechanics
- inventory management
- stunning visuals
- And a delightful experience

### Includes built in Distant Horizons with iris shaders

- go to shaders and select DH bliss and enable distant horizons

Note: 
for best performance I recomend around 6gb dedicated to the game, however it does run, somehow with as little as 8mb and nvidium turned on.

More information:

Welcome to a Delightful new world!

### Horseback Riding

Ride bareback or equip for speed: Horses can now be ridden without a saddle for basic travel and will grow faster with time. However, to unlock their full potential, equip a saddle and consider horsehoes found around the world for increased speed!

### Exploration

Map your discoveries: Press M to open your simple atlas. Place markers and watch it fill out as you explore the vast world!

### Combat

Craft your fighting style: Craft various weapons like spears and daggers, each with unique attacks that complement the new movement mechanics. Find a playstyle that suits you!

### Inventory Management

Expand your carrying capacity: Craft and upgrade bundles and backpacks to manage your loot efficiently!
Customization and Buffs

Discover hidden power: Find and craft trinkets to equip your character. These can customize your appearance or enhance your stats for a tactical advantage.

### Food and Drinks for the Journey

Become a master chef: Utilize the cooking pot, cutting board, and the abundance of new natural foods from all the biome to create delicious and rewarding meals and drinks(including the fun kind). These will keep you fueled for adventure and give you an edge in combat!


Curated by Braverthebrave

_this is my first real play around with mods and java edition I would love feedback_
